action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline CLIP-B/16 2-epoch gives val worst-region 0.4545 (Africa) but TEST worst-region only 0.3347. Test is harder (years 2016-2017). Each epoch ~55s. Analysis: Need stronger model + more epochs. CLIP-L/14 should help a lot. With 4x A100 48GB, can fit L/14 with bs=32-64. Budget 9.96h, plenty of time. Decision: Switch to CLIP-L/14, train 8 epochs, use lower backbone LR. Should take ~25 min for L/14 (4x slower than B/16).
